title: Romania — ONRC Request for Registration — Legal Entities (Anexa nr. 2a — Cerere de înregistrare - persoane juridice)
description: The Oficiul Național al Registrului Comerțului's (ONRC, Romania's National Trade Register Office, under the Ministry of Justice) standardized "Anexa nr. 2a — Cerere de înregistrare - persoane juridice" (Annex no. 2a — Request for Registration — Legal Entities), the omnibus request form an applicant files with the county Trade Register Office (Oficiul Registrului Comerțului, ORCT) for any registrar operation concerning a legal entity, opening Romania's Business Formation vertical (3 of 6) following DMV (ro/dgpci/cerere-operatiune-inmatriculari-transcrieri-radieri-provizorii, GOV-2804) and Taxes (ro/anaf/declaratie-unica-activitati-independente, GOV-2797, 50th jurisdiction). The source is a genuine 4-page AcroForm (confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3: has /AcroForm, no /XFA, 445 Widget annotations — 307 text fields and 138 checkbox/radio-style button fields across 429 distinct AcroForm field names, since 11 field-name groups on this form implement a radio-button-style choice by sharing one field name across 2–4 widgets). The form's own top "solicit:" (I request:) list offers eight mutually exclusive request types: (1) înmatriculare (registration of a new legal entity), (2) înregistrare sucursală persoană juridică română (registration of a branch of a Romanian legal entity), (3) înregistrare sucursală persoană juridică străină (registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity), (4) înscriere mențiuni (amendments to an already-registered entity — a large, separately-checked list of dozens of specific amendment types), (5) înscriere operațiuni comunicate de autoritatea/instituția publică (registering operations communicated by a public authority), (6) radiere (deregistration), (7) îndreptare eroare materială (correction of a material error), and (8) actualizare obiect de activitate conform CAEN Rev.3 (updating the business-activity classification). This v1.0.0 is scoped to legal-entity registration only — request types (1), (2), and (3) above, modeled as a single exclusivityGroups entry (requestedOperationType) — matching this schema's own title and this registry's Business Formation vertical; request types (4)-(8) are post-registration lifecycle operations on an already-registered entity (amendments, authority-communicated operations, deregistration, error correction, classification updates), not registration, and are out of scope for this v1.0.0 (disclosed as a deferred backlog candidate for a future, separately-versioned schema — see VERIFICATION.md). This v1.0.0 models 221 of the 445 source Widget annotations (429 distinct AcroForm field names) as fields[] — the in-scope registration sections plus the universal sections common to every request; see VERIFICATION.md for the full field-count reconciliation. Also models the universal sections common to every request regardless of which of the three in-scope operations is chosen: the applicant/filer's own identity (Section IV), the addressee county Trade Register Office, the applicant's hearing/copy/communication-method preferences (Section VI), the designated contact person (Section VII), billing details (Section VIII), the submitted-documents manifest (Section IX, a table fixed by the source's own print layout at exactly 7 numbered rows — modeled as a bounded document1…document7 repeating group, not an artificially imposed cap, since the source itself prints no more and no fewer rows), the GDPR personal-data-processing acknowledgement (Section X), the annex reference and declaration date (Section XI), and the depositor who physically files the request and its supporting documents (Section XII). Two further boolean exclusivity pairs (how the branch representatives' conferred powers are exercised — jointly or separately) are modeled per branch-registration path (roBranchRepPowers, foreignBranchRepPowers), matching the source's own independent (non-radio) checkbox pairs. The source's own AcroForm also carries three small checkbox widgets duplicating the top-level operation choice immediately beside each of the three in-scope sections' own numbered headings (confirmed via rendered inspection, not just text-layer correlation, since the embedded font failed to render body text in this Node/pdfjs/canvas environment — the checkbox glyphs themselves render as vector paths, independent of the broken font); these are not modeled as separate fields since they duplicate the top-level exclusivityGroups selector's own semantic meaning with no distinguishing information — see VERIFICATION.md. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Romania, the Ministry of Justice, or ONRC.

source.documentRef: ONRC Anexa nr. 2a, "Cerere de înregistrare - persoane juridice"

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2813, opening Romania's Business Formation vertical (3 of 6) following DMV (GOV-2804) and Taxes (GOV-2797, 50th jurisdiction). Independently re-fetched the source from scratch: HTTP 200, application/pdf, 560,332 bytes, sha256 a468c682e442b5ed886289b0ba5235407d7ae4fa18443ae66dafc430aa99c243. Confirmed via pdfjs-dist@3 (legacy build): 4 pages, /AcroForm present, no /XFA, 445 Widget annotations (307 Tx + 138 Btn across 429 distinct field names). Scoped to the form's own registration-type request options (1)-(3) of its 8-way top-level operation selector; see VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, field-count reconciliation, and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: requestNewLegalEntityRegistration
fields.label: înmatricularea
fields.description: Requesting registration (înmatriculare) of a new legal entity in the trade register. One of three mutually exclusive registration-type requests this schema models (see exclusivityGroups); the source form's own "solicit:" list also offers five further operation types (amendments, authority-communicated operations, deregistration, material-error correction, CAEN classification update) that are out of scope for this v1.0.0 — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: requestRomanianLegalEntityBranchRegistration
fields.label: înregistrare sucursală persoană juridică română
fields.description: Requesting registration of a branch (sucursală) of a Romanian legal entity.

fields.name: requestForeignLegalEntityBranchRegistration
fields.label: înregistrare sucursală persoană juridică străină
fields.description: Requesting registration of a branch (sucursală) of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: addresseeTradeRegisterOffice
fields.label: Oficiul Registrului Comerțului de pe lângă Tribunalul
fields.description: The county Trade Register Office (Oficiul Registrului Comerțului, ORCT), identified by the tribunal it sits alongside, that this request is addressed to (e.g. "Tribunalul București").
fields.sourceRef: "OFICIUL REGISTRULUI COMERȚULUI DE PE LÂNGĂ TRIBUNALUL......................" (ORC)

fields.name: applicantSurname
fields.label: Nume
fields.description: The applicant's (the person signing this request) surname.

fields.name: applicantGivenName
fields.label: Prenume
fields.description: The applicant's given name(s).

fields.name: applicantIdNumber
fields.label: CNP/NIF
fields.description: The applicant's CNP (personal numeric code) or NIF (tax identification number, for a foreign national without a CNP).

fields.name: applicantDomicileLocality
fields.label: domiciliat(ă) în localitatea
fields.description: The locality of the applicant's domicile.

fields.name: applicantDomicileStreet
fields.label: str.
fields.description: The street of the applicant's domicile address.

fields.label: nr.
fields.description: The street number of the applicant's domicile address.

fields.name: applicantDomicileBlock
fields.label: bloc
fields.description: The apartment-block identifier of the applicant's domicile address, if applicable.

fields.label: scara
fields.description: The staircase identifier of the applicant's domicile address, if applicable.

fields.name: applicantDomicileFloor
fields.label: etaj
fields.description: The floor of the applicant's domicile address, if applicable.

fields.name: applicantDomicileApartment
fields.label: ap.
fields.description: The apartment number of the applicant's domicile address, if applicable.

fields.name: applicantDomicileCountyOrSector
fields.label: județ/sector
fields.description: The Bucharest sector or county (județ) of the applicant's domicile.

fields.name: applicantDomicileCountry
fields.label: țara
fields.description: The country of the applicant's domicile.

fields.name: applicantCitizenship
fields.label: cetățenia
fields.description: The applicant's citizenship.

fields.name: applicantBirthLocality
fields.label: născut(ă) în localitatea
fields.description: The locality of the applicant's birth.

fields.label: sector/județ
fields.description: The Bucharest sector or county (județ) of the applicant's birthplace.

fields.label: țara
fields.description: The country of the applicant's birth.

fields.label: la data de
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth.

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentType
fields.label: act identitate
fields.description: The type of identity document the applicant presents (e.g. buletin/carte de identitate, pașaport).

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentSeries
fields.label: seria
fields.description: The series of the applicant's identity document.

fields.label: nr.
fields.description: The number of the applicant's identity document.

fields.label: emis(ă) de
fields.description: The authority that issued the applicant's identity document.

fields.label: la data
fields.description: The date the applicant's identity document was issued.

fields.name: applicantIdDocumentValidUntil
fields.label: valabil până la data
fields.description: The expiry date of the applicant's identity document.

fields.name: applicantMaritalPropertyRegime
fields.label: regimul matrimonial (după caz)
fields.description: The applicant's marital property regime, where applicable.

fields.name: applicantCapacity
fields.label: în calitate de
fields.description: The capacity in which the applicant signs this request (e.g. legal representative, associate, attorney-in-fact).

fields.name: applicantRepresentationInstrument
fields.label: prin
fields.description: The instrument by which the applicant's representation capacity/power of attorney was granted (e.g. procură specială/generală, împuternicire avocațială), where applicable.

fields.name: applicantRepresentationLegalBasis
fields.label: conform
fields.description: The specific legal-basis reference (act/document number and date) underlying the applicant's representation capacity.

fields.name: requestObjectLegalBasisReference
fields.label: Obiectul cererii privind înregistrarea în registrul comerțului, prevăzut în
fields.description: The underlying corporate act/document (e.g. actul constitutiv, hotărârea AGA) that the requested trade-register operation is based on.

fields.name: roBranchRepPowersJoint
fields.label: împreună

fields.sourceRef: "cu puteri conferite ce urmează a se exercita, împreună sau separat, conform actului de înființare." (CheckBox9)

fields.name: roBranchRepPowersSeparate
fields.label: separat
fields.description: The branch representatives' powers are exercised separately (separat).

fields.name: roBranchParentEntityRegisteredAtOrct
fields.label: este înregistrată la ORCT
fields.description: The county Trade Register Office (ORCT) where the Romanian parent legal entity (the one opening the branch) is itself registered. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a Romanian legal entity.

fields.name: roBranchParentEntityName
fields.label: denumire
fields.description: The name of the Romanian parent legal entity. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a Romanian legal entity.

fields.name: roBranchParentEntityRegistrationNumber
fields.label: număr de înmatriculare
fields.description: The trade-register registration number of the Romanian parent legal entity. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a Romanian legal entity.

fields.name: roBranchParentEntityCui
fields.label: CUI

fields.name: foreignEntityNameAndLegalForm
fields.label: Firma și forma juridică a persoanei juridice din străinătate
fields.description: The name and legal form of the foreign legal entity opening the branch. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRegisterCountry
fields.label: înmatriculată în registrul din țara
fields.description: The country of the register the foreign legal entity is recorded in. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRegistrationNumber
fields.label: număr de înregistrare

fields.name: foreignEntityEuid
fields.label: EUID
fields.description: The foreign legal entity's European Unique Identifier (EUID), if it has one. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepSurname
fields.label: Nume
fields.description: The surname of the foreign legal entity's representative. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepGivenName

fields.name: foreignEntityRepIdDocumentType
fields.label: act identitate
fields.description: The type of identity document the foreign legal entity's representative presents. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepIdDocumentSeries
fields.label: seria
fields.description: The series of the representative's identity document. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepIdDocumentNumber
fields.label: nr.
fields.description: The number of the representative's identity document. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepIdDocumentIssuedBy

fields.description: The authority that issued the representative's identity document. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepIdDocumentIssuedDate
fields.label: la data
fields.description: The date the representative's identity document was issued. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepIdDocumentValidUntil
fields.label: valabil până la data
fields.description: The expiry date of the representative's identity document. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignEntityRepCapacity
fields.label: în calitate de

fields.name: foreignBranchName
fields.label: Firma sucursalei

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeLocality
fields.label: localitatea
fields.description: The locality of the branch's registered office. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.label: str.
fields.description: The street of the branch's registered office. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeNumber
fields.label: nr.
fields.description: The street number of the branch's registered office. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeBlock
fields.label: bloc
fields.description: The apartment-block identifier of the branch's registered office, if applicable. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeStaircase
fields.label: scara
fields.description: The staircase identifier of the branch's registered office, if applicable. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeFloor

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeApartment
fields.label: ap.

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeCountyOrSector
fields.label: județ/sector

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficeEmail
fields.label: e-mail

fields.name: foreignBranchOfficePhone
fields.label: telefon

fields.label: împreună

fields.sourceRef: "cu puteri ce urmează a fi exercitate împreună sau separat, conform actului constitutiv." (CheckBox12)

fields.name: foreignBranchRepPowersSeparate
fields.label: separat
fields.description: The branch representatives' powers are exercised separately (separat).

fields.name: foreignEntityApplicableNationalLaw
fields.label: Legea națională aplicabilă persoanei juridice
fields.description: The national law applicable to the foreign legal entity, for branches of legal entities from states that are not EU member states or EEA-participating states. Applicable only when requesting registration of a branch of a foreign legal entity.
fields.sourceRef: "Legea națională aplicabilă persoanei juridice (în cazul sucursalelor persoanelor juridice din state care nu sunt state membre ale Uniunii Europene sau state participante la Spațiul Economic European)........................................................."

fields.name: requestPublicHearing
fields.label: audiență publică
fields.description: Requesting a public hearing (audiență publică). Independent, non-exclusive request alongside the copy/certified-copy/communication requests below.

fields.name: requestPlainCopies
fields.label: copii
fields.description: Requesting plain copies of the documents on file.

fields.name: requestCertifiedCopies
fields.label: copii certificate de pe documentele
fields.description: Requesting certified copies of specified documents on file; gates requestCertifiedCopiesDocuments.

fields.name: requestCertifiedCopiesDocuments
fields.label: copii certificate de pe documentele …
fields.description: Which documents on file the applicant requests certified copies of. Required only when requestCertifiedCopies is selected.

fields.name: requestDocumentCommunication
fields.label: comunicarea documentelor care atestă efectuarea înregistrării în registrul comerțului, într-o singură modalitate
fields.description: Requesting communication of the documents attesting the registration, via a single specified delivery method; gates communicationMethod.
fields.sourceRef: "comunicarea documentelor care atestă efectuarea înregistrării în registrul comerțului într-o singură modalitate:" (CheckBox90)

fields.name: communicationMethod
fields.label: poștă / curier / mijloace electronice / sediul O.R.C.T.
fields.description: The single delivery method chosen for communication of the registration documents: post (poștă), courier (curier), electronic means (mijloace electronice), or collection at the ORCT premises (sediul O.R.C.T.). Modeled as a single enum field, not independent booleans, since the source PDF implements this choice as one shared AcroForm field (four same-named radio-style widgets, exportValues v1–v4) rather than four independently-checkable boxes. Required only when requestDocumentCommunication is selected.
fields.sourceRef: "poștă curier mijloace electronice sediul O.R.C.T……………..........." (CheckBox90_2, shared field name across 4 widgets)

fields.name: communicationOrctOfficeDetail
fields.label: sediul O.R.C.T. ……………...........
fields.description: Free-text detail accompanying the delivery-method choice (e.g. which ORCT premises/county office), printed as a blank following the delivery-method list.

fields.name: contactPersonSurname
fields.label: Nume
fields.description: The surname of the person designated to receive communications about this request.

fields.name: contactPersonGivenName
fields.label: Prenume
fields.description: The given name(s) of the contact person.

fields.name: contactPersonAddressLocality

fields.description: The contact person's telephone number.

fields.name: contactPersonEmail
fields.label: e-mail
fields.description: The contact person's e-mail address.

fields.name: billingNameOrCompany
fields.label: Nume și Prenume/ firmă
fields.description: The name (natural person) or company name the invoice should be issued to.

fields.name: billingIdNumber
fields.label: CNP/CUI
fields.description: The CNP or CUI of the invoice recipient.

fields.name: billingEmail
fields.label: e-mail
fields.description: The e-mail address for billing correspondence.

fields.name: billingBank
fields.label: Banca
fields.description: The invoice recipient's bank.

fields.name: billingIban
fields.label: CONT IBAN
fields.description: The invoice recipient's IBAN account.

fields.name: billingAddress
fields.label: Sediul social/Adresa
fields.description: The registered office (legal entity) or address (natural person) of the invoice recipient.

fields.name: document1RefNumberAndIssuer
fields.label: Nr. și data actului / Emitent (rândul 1: Hotărâre adunare generală/Directorat/Decizie CA)
fields.description: The reference number/date and issuer of the constitutive/resolution act filed with this request (row 1 of the OPIS table is pre-labeled "Hotărâre adunare generală/ Directorat / Decizie CA" by the form itself, so only the reference and page-count columns are fillable for this row).
fields.sourceRef: "1.Hotărâre adunare generală/ Directorat / Decizie CA ... Nr.și data actului / Emitent"

fields.name: document1PageCount
fields.label: Nr. file (rândul 1)
fields.description: The number of pages of the row-1 document (the constitutive/resolution act).

fields.name: document1ManuscriptCharacterCount
fields.label: conține ... caractere
fields.description: The character count of the row-1 act's own text as prepared for publication in the Official Gazette (Monitorul Oficial al României).
fields.sourceRef: "(Actul pentru publicare în Monitorul Oficial al României conține ................. caractere, respectiv un nr de……...…pagini (manuscris)"

fields.name: document1ManuscriptPageCount
fields.label: un nr de ... pagini (manuscris)
fields.description: The manuscript page count of the row-1 act's own text as prepared for publication in the Official Gazette.

fields.name: document2Name
fields.label: Denumirea actului
fields.description: The name/type of the document filed as attachment row 2 of the submitted-documents manifest (OPIS DE DOCUMENTE DEPUSE).

fields.label: Nr. și data actului / Emitent
fields.description: The reference number/date and issuer of the document filed as attachment row 2.

fields.name: document2PageCount
fields.label: Nr. file
fields.description: The number of pages of the document filed as attachment row 2.

fields.label: Denumirea actului
fields.description: The name/type of the document filed as attachment row 3 of the submitted-documents manifest (OPIS DE DOCUMENTE DEPUSE).

fields.description: The reference number/date and issuer of the document filed as attachment row 3.

fields.label: Nr. file
fields.description: The number of pages of the document filed as attachment row 3.

fields.description: The name/type of the document filed as attachment row 4 of the submitted-documents manifest (OPIS DE DOCUMENTE DEPUSE).

fields.description: The reference number/date and issuer of the document filed as attachment row 4.

fields.label: Nr. file

fields.description: The name/type of the document filed as attachment row 6 of the submitted-documents manifest (OPIS DE DOCUMENTE DEPUSE).

fields.description: The reference number/date and issuer of the document filed as attachment row 6.

fields.description: The name/type of the document filed as attachment row 7 of the submitted-documents manifest (OPIS DE DOCUMENTE DEPUSE).

fields.name: documentsTotalPageCount
fields.label: Total file
fields.description: The total page count across all documents listed in the submitted-documents manifest (OPIS DE DOCUMENTE DEPUSE).

fields.name: gdprAcknowledgementSignatoryName
fields.label: (Nume și prenume)
fields.description: The name of the person acknowledging the GDPR personal-data-processing notice (X. Prelucrarea datelor cu caracter personal). The adjacent "(Semnătura)" signature line carries no fillable widget on this specimen and so is not modeled as a field.
fields.sourceRef: "Am fost informat cu privire la prelucrarea datelor cu caracter personal efectuată în scopul soluționării prezentei cereri. ... (Numeși prenume)(Data)(Semnătura)"

fields.name: gdprAcknowledgementDate
fields.label: (Data)
fields.description: The date the GDPR personal-data-processing notice was acknowledged.

fields.name: annexNumbers
fields.label: Anexele nr. ... fac parte integrantă din prezenta cerere
fields.description: The number(s) of the annexes that form an integral part of this request.
fields.sourceRef: "XI. Anexele nr. ................... fac parte integrantă din prezenta cerere."

fields.name: declarationDate
fields.label: (Data)
fields.description: The date the request is signed, made on a single original copy, on the applicant's own responsibility, aware that inaccurate statements are punished by law. The adjacent "(Semnătura)" signature line carries no fillable widget on this specimen and so is not modeled as a field.
fields.sourceRef: "Întocmită într-un exemplar, pe propria răspundere, cunoscând că declarațiile inexacte sunt pedepsite conform legii. ...... (Data)(Semnătura)"

fields.name: depositorSurname
fields.label: Nume
fields.description: The surname of the person depositing this request and its supporting documents with the trade register office. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.
fields.sourceRef: "XII.Prezenta cerere de înregistrare și documentele în susținerea acesteia se depun de către: Nume........................................................."

fields.name: depositorGivenName
fields.label: Prenume
fields.description: The given name(s) of the depositor. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorIdDocumentType
fields.label: posesor al actului de identitate
fields.description: The type of identity document the depositor presents. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorIdDocumentSeries
fields.label: seria
fields.description: The series of the depositor's identity document. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorIdDocumentNumber
fields.label: nr.
fields.description: The number of the depositor's identity document. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorIdNumber
fields.label: CNP
fields.description: The depositor's CNP (personal numeric code). Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorCapacity
fields.label: în calitate de
fields.description: The capacity in which the depositor acts (e.g. legal representative, associate, courier). Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorLegalBasisDocument
fields.label: conform
fields.description: The document the depositor's capacity/authorization is based on. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorLegalBasisNumber
fields.label: nr.
fields.description: The reference number of the depositor's authorization document. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorLegalBasisDate
fields.label: din
fields.description: The date of the depositor's authorization document. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.

fields.name: depositorGdprAcknowledgementDate
fields.label: (Data)
fields.description: The date the depositor acknowledges the GDPR personal-data-processing notice repeated for the depositor specifically ("Am fost informat cu privire la prelucrarea datelor cu caracter personal efectuată în scopul soluționării prezentei cereri.", footnote 10). The adjacent "(Semnătura)" signature line carries no fillable widget on this specimen and so is not modeled as a field. Completed only when the depositor is a different person than the signer of the request (note 12: "Se va completa de către deponent numai dacă este altă persoană decât semnatarul cererii."); left optional since the form prints no explicit yes/no gate distinguishing the two cases.
fields.sourceRef: "Am fost informat cu privire la prelucrarea datelor cu caracter personal efectuată în scopul soluționării prezentei cereri.(10) ...... (Data)(Semnătura)"
